# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-1
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service-1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service-1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service-1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: low-latency-app
          image: busybox:1.36.1
          command: ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Low latency service 1 running' && sleep 3600"]
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-2
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service-2
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service-2
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service-2
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: critical-process
          image: nginx:1.25.3
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
              name: http
